# Support

## Documentation First
- Start with `README.md`
- Then review `docs/architecture/public-baseline.md`
- Use `docs/configuration/runtime-configuration.md` for runtime variable guidance

## When to Open an Issue
- Bugs or regressions
- Documentation problems
- Missing developer workflow steps
- Public-safe feature requests

## Security
For vulnerabilities or credential exposure, do not open a public issue. Follow `SECURITY.md`.
